# rename: --no-renames reports delete + add -> drift on both old and new
exec git init
exec git config user.email t@example.com
exec git config user.name t
exec git config commit.gpgsign false

# commit 1: SPEC lists old.go; old.go present (in sync)
exec git add pkg/SPEC.md pkg/old.go
exec git commit -m init

# commit 2: rename old.go -> new.go (same content); SPEC untouched.
# --no-renames => D old.go (still listed) + A new.go (source type, unlisted).
exec git mv pkg/old.go pkg/new.go
exec git commit -m rename

! psy check
stdout 'pkg: NG'
stdout 'old\.go \(removed\)'
stdout 'new\.go \(added\)'

-- pkg/old.go --
package pkg
-- pkg/SPEC.md --
---
package: pkg
---

# 文件

- `old.go` — o
